name: Vinegar and Your Kitchen Floors
recipeInstructions:
1. To clean and restore your no-wax floors to a sparkling shine, add 1 cup of vinegar to a bucket of warm water and mop as usual. The vinegar will eliminate grease without stripping the floors of their protective finish.
2. For a particularly tough stain on the floor, pour a small amount of vinegar directly on the spot and let it stand for 30 minutes. If the stain persists, repeat the process, then scrub with a soft toothbrush or nail brush and rinse.
3. To easily clean wooden floors, use a mixture of half water and half vinegar. Apply the solution sparingly and dry with a clean towel.
